basicDetails.schemeName: Healthy Lifestyle for School Children through Ayurvidya-AYUSH

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Healthy Lifestyle for School Children through Ayurvidya-AYUSH” is implemented by the Ayush Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote and develop a healthy lifestyle among school children through the principles and practices of AYUSH.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Promoting a healthy lifestyle among school children through AYUSH and providing free distribution of medicines based on their specific health conditions. This facility is provided free of cost to the students.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and develop a healthy lifestyle among school children through the principles and practices of AYUSH. Under this initiative, free AYUSH-based health services and medicines are provided to children registered in government schools.

children.text: The “Healthy Lifestyle for School Children through Ayurvidya-AYUSH” is implemented by the Ayush Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote and develop a healthy lifestyle among school children through the principles and practices of AYUSH.

Promoting a healthy lifestyle among school children through AYUSH and providing free distribution of medicines based on their specific health conditions. This facility is provided free of cost to the students.
School children may contact the concerned authorities of their respective government schools to avail the benefits under this scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md: School children may contact the concerned authorities of their respective government schools to avail the benefits under this scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The beneficiary must be a student enrolled in a government school in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The beneficiary must be a student enrolled in a government school in Uttarakhand.
